mapper.sql: t1.ID, t1.LEAGUE_CODE, t1.LEAGUE_NAME, t1.IS_LEAD_PARTY, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.PARENT_ID, t1.TREE_PATH, t1.TREE_SORT, t1.TREE_SORTS, t1.TREE_LEAF, t1.TREE_LEVEL, t1.VALID_FLAG, t1.ATTRIBUTE_01, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.ATTRIBUTE_07, t1.ATTRIBUTE_08, t1.ATTRIBUTE_09, t1.ATTRIBUTE_10, t1.START_DATE, t1.FINISH_DATE
mapper.select:
select
from DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA t1 where t1.PARENT_ID = #{id} order by t1.tree_sorts asc

select
from DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA t1 where t1.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} and t1.id <> #{id} order by t1.tree_sorts asc

select
from DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA t1
and t1.LEAGUE_NAME like concat(concat('%',#{leagueName}),'%')
and t1.org_identity = #{orgIdentity}
order by t1.tree_sorts asc

select
from DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA t1
or t1.id in
#{id}
order by t1.tree_sorts asc

select
from DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA t1
and t1.org_identity = #{orgIdentity}
and t1.PARENT_ID = '-1'

select
from DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA t1
and t1.tree_path like concat(#{treePath},'%') and t1.tree_path <> #{treePath}
order by t1.tree_sorts asc
mapper.insert:
insert into DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA
ID,
LEAGUE_CODE,
LEAGUE_NAME,
IS_LEAD_PARTY,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
CREATED_DEPT,
PARENT_ID,
TREE_PATH,
TREE_SORT,
TREE_SORTS,
TREE_LEAF,
TREE_LEVEL,
VALID_FLAG,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
START_DATE,
FINISH_DATE,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{leagueCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{leagueName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{isLeadParty,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{treePath,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{treeSort,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{treeSorts,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{treeLeaf,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{treeLevel,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{startDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{finishDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LEAGUE_CODE = #{leagueCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LEAGUE_NAME = #{leagueName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
IS_LEAD_PARTY = #{isLeadParty,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TREE_PATH = #{treePath,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TREE_SORT = #{treeSort,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
TREE_SORTS = #{treeSorts,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TREE_LEAF = #{treeLeaf,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TREE_LEVEL = #{treeLevel,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
VALID_FLAG = #{validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
START_DATE = #{startDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
FINISH_DATE = #{finishDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAGUE_CODE = #{item.leagueCode,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAGUE_NAME = #{item.leagueName,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , IS_LEAD_PARTY = #{item.isLeadParty,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PARENT_ID = #{item.parentId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TREE_PATH = #{item.treePath,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TREE_SORT = #{item.treeSort,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , TREE_SORTS = #{item.treeSorts,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TREE_LEAF = #{item.treeLeaf,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TREE_LEVEL = #{item.treeLevel,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , VALID_FLAG = #{item.validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , START_DATE = #{item.startDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , FINISH_DATE = #{item.finishDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}

mapper.select: select MAX(TREE_SORT) from DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA t1 where t1.PARENT_ID = #{parentId}

select
from DYN_TRADE_UNION_ORGANIZA t1 where t1.ATTRIBUTE_02 like concat(concat('%',#{attribute02}),'%')
